Name: Setting Info
Description: Global scene and rendering configuration parameters for environmental lighting, background color, and dynamic light collection used in post-processing and scene evaluation.

Fields.Name: Use Depth Texture
Fields.Description: Enables usage of the scene depth buffer for post-processing effects such as depth of field, SSAO, and fog.

Fields.Name: Enable Lens Distortion
Fields.Description: Applies lens distortion to simulate camera optics, including barrel or pincushion distortion.

Fields.Name: Enable Aperture Airy Disc
Fields.Description: Enables diffraction-based blur patterns (Airy disk) to simulate realistic aperture diffraction in highlights.

Fields.Name: Enable Aperture Airy Disk: Unlimited Radius
Fields.Description: Removes radius limits on Airy disk simulation, allowing large diffraction patterns for strong highlights.

Fields.Name: Enable Motion Blur Depth of Field
Fields.Description: Enables motion blur that interacts with depth of field, combining motion and focus-based blur effects.

Fields.Name: Enable Motion Blur: Unlimited Recursion
Fields.Description: Allows motion blur to accumulate recursively for stronger streaking effects, potentially increasing cost.

Fields.Name: Enable Motion Blur Internal Velocity Texture
Fields.Description: Generates an internal velocity buffer for motion blur when external motion vectors are unavailable.

Fields.Name: Enable Gaussian
Fields.Description: Enables Gaussian blur filtering, typically used for bloom, glare, or general smoothing.

Fields.Name: Enable Feedback Effect
Fields.Description: Enables temporal feedback effects where previous frame data is blended into the current frame for stylized or smoothing effects.

Fields.Name: Enable Anti-Aliasing
Fields.Description: Enables post-process anti-aliasing to reduce jagged edges and improve image smoothness.

Fields.Name: Enable Light Shaft
Fields.Description: Enables volumetric light shafts (god rays) caused by light scattering through occluding geometry.

Fields.Name: Enable Chromatic Aberration
Fields.Description: Enables lens-based color fringing effect caused by wavelength-dependent refraction.

Fields.Name: Enable Anamophic Lens Aspect Ratio
Fields.Description: Simulates anamorphic lens stretching, affecting bokeh shape and horizontal flare characteristics.

Fields.Name: Enable Anamorphic Lens Aperture
Fields.Description: Enables anamorphic aperture simulation, influencing bokeh shape and highlight distortion.

Fields.Name: Enable Color Grading
Fields.Description: Enables color grading adjustments such as LUTs or HSV transformations for final image tone control.

Fields.Name: Scene Luminance Scale
Fields.Description: Applies a global luminance scaling factor to the scene before post-processing, affecting overall brightness and exposure response.

Fields.Name: Blur Shape
Fields.Description: Selects the kernel shape used for blur effects (e.g., circular, hexagonal, anamorphic).

Fields.Name: Use Glare Quality
Fields.Description: Enables higher quality glare and bloom processing with improved sampling and filtering.

Fields.Name: Depth of Field Quality
Fields.Description: Controls the quality level of depth of field rendering, affecting sample count and blur accuracy.

Fields.Name: Light Collection: Enable Auto Compute
Fields.Description: Enables automatic gathering and evaluation of scene lights for post-processing and global illumination setup.

Fields.Name: Light Collection: Base Distance
Fields.Description: Base radius used to determine which lights are included in the light collection system.

Fields.Name: Light Collection: Distance Scaler
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to light collection distance thresholds to expand or reduce light influence range.

Fields.Name: Light Collection: Maximum Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which lights are considered for inclusion in scene lighting calculations.

Fields.Name: Reflect Scene: Assign Dynamic Light
Fields.Description: Enables dynamic lights to be included in reflection rendering for more accurate reflective surfaces.
